name: Bancorp 34, Inc.
business: Bancorp 34 is a bank holding company that provides commercial and consumer banking services, including loans, deposits, and treasury management, primarily to businesses and individuals in Arizona and New Mexico.

exposures.sentence: We compete with commercial banks, credit unions, savings institutions, mortgage banking firms, consumer finance companies, securities brokerage firms, insurance companies, money market funds and other mutual funds, loan production offices and other providers of financial services, including nontraditional financial technology companies or FinTech companies, as well as super-regional, national and international financial institutions that operate offices in our market areas and elsewhere.
we experienced cybersecurity incidents in June of 2023 in which an unauthorized third party gained access to the email accounts of two of our employees.
